title: Simple Structures: Botania
description: The modification adds structure to the Botania mod
body:
This modification adds a small structure to the **Botania** mod.
- Large mushrooms
- Big flowers
- The ruins
- Fallen trees
- Floating islands

_______________________________________________________________________________________________
